query: 分析易方达主动权益业务画像，包括规模结构和头部基金

args.sql: WITH latest_size AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_company, asset_type, fund_size FROM fund_size WHERE fund_name LIKE '%易方达%' AND date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_size) LIMIT 200) SELECT s.fund_code AS 基金代码, s.fund_name AS 基金名称, s.fund_company AS 基金公司, s.asset_type AS 资产类型, s.fund_size AS 规模(万元), p.portfolio_return AS 近一年收益率(%) FROM latest_size s LEFT JOIN fund_performance p ON s.fund_code = p.fund_code AND p.period = '本年以来' LIMIT 200

plan.rationale: 查询最新规模的易方达主动权益基金，结合业绩数据分析其收益表现
